llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm (copilot) is present in the study; it is compared against a control arm without Copilot access.
llm_extracted.notes: Primary overall comparison extracted. The study reports means for both arms (control: 53.84 min, copilot: 44.29 min) and a 29.79% reduction in task completion time. Since time is smaller-is-better, the reduction is coded as -0.2979. Multiple sub-analyses by scenario and task type are also reported in the statistics, but the overall comparison is used for the primary extraction. No SDs or SEs are reported, only means.
source_quotes: Across all scenarios and tasks, Copilot subjects experienced a 34.53% improvement in overall accuracy and a 29.79% reduction in task completion time.

computed.notes: Primary overall comparison extracted. The study reports means for both arms (control: 53.84 min, copilot: 44.29 min) and a 29.79% reduction in task completion time. Since time is smaller-is-better, the reduction is coded as -0.2979. Multiple sub-analyses by scenario and task type are also reported in the statistics, but the overall comparison is used for the primary extraction. No SDs or SEs are reported, only means. | SDs/SEs missing; variance not computable
